steps.title: Use the one-solution case
steps.content: An equation of the form $|x-7|=c$ has no solutions if $c<0$, two solutions if $c>0$, and exactly one solution if $c=0$.

steps.title: Choose the required value
steps.content:
Exactly one solution requires
$$\frac{k}{3}=0$$
This matches the listed option that says $0$ only. The answer is C.
